A

AbstractClient - Class in ocsf.client
The AbstractClient contains all the methods necessary to set up the client side of a client-server architecture.
AbstractClient(String, int) - Constructor for class ocsf.client.AbstractClient
Constructs the client.
AbstractServer - Class in ocsf.server
The AbstractServer class maintains a thread that waits for connection attempts from clients.
AbstractServer(int) - Constructor for class ocsf.server.AbstractServer
Constructs a new server.
action - Variable in class entities.Request
 
action - Variable in class entities.Response
 
ActionType - Enum Class in entities
Enumeration defining the specific actions (commands) for client-server communication.
ActionType() - Constructor for enum class entities.ActionType
 
AdaptableClient - Class in ocsf.client
The AdaptableClient is a class that extends the AbstractClient in place of the ObservableClient .
AdaptableClient(String, int, ObservableClient) - Constructor for class ocsf.client.AdaptableClient
Constructs the client adapter.
AdaptableServer - Class in ocsf.server
The AdaptableServer is an adapter class that extends the AbstractServer class in place of the AbstractObservableServer .
AdaptableServer(int, ObservableServer) - Constructor for class ocsf.server.AdaptableServer
Constructs the server adapter.
addClient(String, String) - Method in class server.gui.ServerViewController
Adds a new client to the connected clients table.
addClientOnline(ConnectionToClient) - Method in class server.controller.Router
Adds a new client connection to the active clients list.
addListener(MessageListener) - Method in class clientGui.ClientUi
Adds a listener that will receive server messages.
addTable(Table) - Method in class DAO.TableDAO
Adds a new table to the database.
Alarm - Class in entities
Utility class for handling UI alerts and notifications within the JavaFX application.
Alarm() - Constructor for class entities.Alarm
 
amountToPay - Variable in class clientGui.reservation.PaymentController
 
apiKey - Static variable in class server.controller.EmailService
 
appendOrderTable(StringBuilder, List<Order>) - Method in class server.controller.MonthlyReportService
Helper method to create a simple financial log table for the report.
appendTimeLogTable(StringBuilder, List<Order>) - Method in class server.controller.MonthlyReportService
Helper method to create a detailed HTML table showing booking times, actual arrival, and delay calculations.
appendWaitingListTable(StringBuilder, List<WaitingList>) - Method in class server.controller.MonthlyReportService
Helper method to create a table displaying waiting list entries.
APPROVED - Enum constant in enum class entities.Order.OrderStatus
 
arrivalTime - Variable in class entities.Order
 
arrivalTimeColumn - Variable in class clientGui.reservation.OrderUi_controller
 
arrivalTimeField - Variable in class clientGui.reservation.UpdateOrder
 
autoCheckOutSeatedOrders() - Method in class server.controller.OrderCleanupThread
Automatically processes checkout for orders that have been seated for the duration of the dining limit (2 hours).
